title: Rituals
description: Rituals are special crafting events where an item is infused with magic, taking time to complete. During a ritual, the ingredients are consumed, and a powerful item appears once the process finishes, accompanied by visual effects and a timer.
body:
this plugin is great for PvP events and more!

# **Commands**
![Replace this with a description](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/22e618fc26a1a4f15c116a5f794e0df2c5fae263.png)
(Add items that you want to start a ritual when crafted)


![Replace this with a description](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/a347ca94648011e25740eb808bf4c98533fe6efc.png)
(start a ritual with the set amount of time)

# **Features**
> ✅ Change Time 
> 
> ✅ Add Crafts
> 
> ✅ Saves on Restarts

# **Config**
```
ritual-duration-seconds: 30
```
